questions.question: Which Indian state has the highest number of national parks?
questions.explanation: Madhya Pradesh has the highest number of national parks in India, with a total of 9 national parks, including Kanha, Bandhavgarh, and Pench.

questions.question: Who was the leader of the Indian independence movement during the Non-Cooperation Movement?
